# Alvys API

> Unlock the full potential of your logistics operations with the Alvys API. Public REST API and MCP documentation for integrators and AI agents.

## Documentation

- [Home](https://alvys.mintlify.io/): Alvys Public API overview and quick paths
- [Getting Started](https://alvys.mintlify.io/docs/getting-started): Create credentials and make your first API call
- [Authentication](https://alvys.mintlify.io/docs/authentication): OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials and scopes
- [Versioning](https://alvys.mintlify.io/docs/versioning): API version selection and compatibility
- [Base URL](https://alvys.mintlify.io/docs/base-url): Production URL format

## API Reference

- [OpenAPI spec](https://alvys.mintlify.io/openapi/alvys.json): Full Public API specification
- [Loads](https://alvys.mintlify.io/api-reference/loads): Load search and retrieval
- [Drivers](https://alvys.mintlify.io/api-reference/drivers): Driver records and events
- [Carriers](https://alvys.mintlify.io/api-reference/carriers): Carrier search and profiles

## AI & Agents

- [MCP overview](https://alvys.mintlify.io/ai-agents/mcp): Connect AI agents to Alvys
- [Available MCP Tools](https://alvys.mintlify.io/ai-agents/available-mcp-tools): Full tool catalog with scopes

## Changelog

- [Changelog](https://alvys.mintlify.io/changelog): Public API and MCP release notes
